info.name: Ecom AI Customer Support (Backend)
info.description: Postman collection for the FastAPI backend powering the WooCommerce AI Customer Support project.

request.description: Sends a chat message. Backend will decide to use AI or return handoff state depending on escalation.
Retrieves messages after a specific ID for the user's session. Use this to load history (after_id=0) and poll for new agent messages.
User-initiated escalation. Marks conversation escalated and triggers Make.com webhook if configured.
Returns all messages for a conversation after an id. Requires x-admin-token.
Inserts a human agent message into the conversation.
Marks conversation escalated (admin_started) and emits a system message so the frontend switches to human handoff.

item.name: Admin • End Human Chat (back to AI)

request.description: Marks conversation back to normal and emits a system message so the frontend resumes AI.
